Session.Missing: Session missing. Please sign in again.
Session.Expired: Your session has expired — please sign in again.

Generate.NotSignedIn: Please sign in with Patreon before generating.
Generate.AlreadyInProgress: A generation is already in progress.

ImageGen.Title: Generate NPC Image
ImageGen.NotSignedIn: Please sign in with Patreon before generating an image.
ImageGen.NoNpc: No {noun} available — generate or open one first.
ImageGen.NotSupported: Image generation is not supported in this module.
ImageGen.Generating: Generating NPC image… this may take a moment.

ImageConfirm.CostNote: This will use {cost} NPC uses from your monthly allowance.

ClearHistory.Title: Clear History
ClearHistory.Content: Delete all history entries? This cannot be undone.

QuickEdit.Title: Quick-Edit: {name}
QuickEdit.Hint: Fix any details before the sheet opens:

RawData.Title: Download Raw Data
RawData.Content: The AI generated data but Foundry rejected the document. Download the raw JSON to keep it?

Feedback.MissingMessage: Please enter a feedback message before sending.
Feedback.Failed: Failed to send feedback. Please try again.

ResetWelcome.Name: Reset Welcome Message
ResetWelcome.Label: Reset
ResetWelcome.Hint: Show the welcome message again on the next world reload.
ResetWelcome.ConfirmContent: Reset the welcome message so it appears again on the next reload?
ResetWelcome.Success: Welcome message will show again on the next reload.

ClearSession.Name: Clear Stored Session
ClearSession.Label: Clear Session
ClearSession.Hint: Remove the stored Patreon session key. You will need to sign in again.
ClearSession.ConfirmContent: Remove the stored Patreon session key? You will need to sign in again.
ClearSession.Success: Session key cleared. Please sign in again.

IncomeJitter.Name: Income Variance (%)
IncomeJitter.Hint: How much random variance to apply to each store's daily income. 0 = fixed, 15 = ±15% (default), 50 = ±50%.

ResetWelcome.Name: Reset Welcome Message
ResetWelcome.Label: Reset
ResetWelcome.Hint: Show the settlement builder welcome message again on the next world reload.
ResetWelcome.ConfirmContent: Reset the welcome message so it appears again on the next reload?
ResetWelcome.Success: Welcome message will show again on the next reload.

ClearSettlements.Name: Clear Stored Session
ClearSettlements.Label: Clear Session
ClearSettlements.Hint: Remove the stored Patreon session key for the Settlement Builder.
ClearSettlements.ConfirmContent: Remove the stored session key? You will need to sign in again.
ClearSettlements.Success: Session key cleared. Please sign in again.

ResetCalendar.Name: Reset Calendar to Default
ResetCalendar.Label: Reset Calendar
ResetCalendar.Hint: Reset the Pf2eCalendarTimeline to the default Golarion calendar and clear all scheduled events.
ResetCalendar.ConfirmContent: Reset the calendar to the default Golarion settings? This will clear all scheduled events and cannot be undone.
ResetCalendar.NotActive: Pf2eCalendarTimeline is not installed or active.
ResetCalendar.Success: Calendar reset to default Golarion settings.

FixtureSheet.Name: Open Fixture Settlement (QA)
FixtureSheet.Label: Open Fixture Sheet
FixtureSheet.Hint: GM only — opens a temporary pre-filled settlement sheet for QA testing. The journal is deleted automatically when the sheet is closed.
